segments.text: ओम् नमो भग्वते वासुदेवाय ओम् नमो भग्वते वासुदेवाय
रिडिंग फ्रॉम शिमत भागोतं कैंटो नमबर त्री चाप्टर नमबर एटीन टेक्स्ट नमबर एट
The Lord placed the earth within his sight on the surface of the water and transferred to her his own energy in the form of ability to float on the water.
While the enemy stood looking on, Brahma, the creator of the universe, extolled the Lord and the other demigods rained flowers on him.
Those who are demons cannot understand how the supreme personality of God had floated the earth on water.
But to devotees of the Lord, this is not a very wonderful fact.
Not only the earth, but many, many millions of planets are floating in the air and this floating power is endowed upon them by the Lord.
There is no other possible explanation.
The materialist can explain that the planet...
The planets are floating by the law of gravitation, but the law of gravitation works under the control of the direction of the Supreme Lord.

That is a version of the Bhagavad Gita which confirms by the Lord's statement that behind the material laws or nature's law and behind the growth, maintenance, production and evolution of all the planetary systems, behind everything is the Lord's direction.
The Lord's activities cannot be appreciated only...
The Lord's activities could be appreciated only by the demigods headed by Brahma.
And therefore when they saw the uncommon prowess of the Lord in keeping the earth on the surface of the water, the shard flowers on him in appreciation of his transcendental activity.
So here in this verse, the chapter is the battle between Lord Bohr and Hiranapsha.
The demon, Hiranapsha, who had golden hair on the head and fearful tusk, gave chase to the Lord while he was rising from the water, even as an alligator would chase an elephant.
Are you not ashamed of running away before a challenging adversary?
There is nothing reproachable for shameless creatures.
So here, Hiranapsha is chasing Lord, who is trying to lift Mother Earth from the ocean.
Roaring like thunder, and he is using abusive words and saying,
Are you not ashamed of running away?
He was thinking that the Lord, when he is rising, lifting the Mother Earth, and Hiranapsha is chasing the Lord, it appeared to him that the Lord is running out of fear.
Are you not ashamed of running away?
And then he uses the word, nothing reproachable for shameless creatures.
There are different kinds of demons, atheists, all kinds of impersonalists, mayavadis, who may blaspheme the Lord, or sometimes use words which may be very painful for the Lord.
The Lord has given us the free will, and He does not interfere.
Just like here, at that very moment when Hiranapsha is using these kind of words, he could have just smashed him, killed him.
Even to the extent of abusing the Lord.
Unmindful of the Lord, unmindful of all these words which were spoken by Hiranapsha, the Lord...
To protect the pious, the devotees, the Lord placed the Earth within the sight of the surface of water,
His own energy, in the form of ability to float on the water.
Actually, if you see around us, even with common sense, we can very easily understand that wonderful things which are happening in nature around us, in the world around us,
just like if the Sun is shining and we are in a dark room...
... and we are hellbent not to open the doors, not to open the windows,
Then there is no point in...
There is no light or there is no sun. We all have seen that presentation. The earth is moving around the sun at a speed of 1,006,000 km per hour.
Phenomenal speed and the mass is 6 x 10 to the power 21 metric tons. Generally when we see on a highway we see a big lorry fully loaded, 15 tons, maybe 20 tons.
Generally on the highway we see boards saying that,
the lorry's speed limit is 40 km per hour.
Because they know that more the weight, bigger the lorry, higher the possibility of an accident if it crosses beyond a particular speed.
So here we see 6 x 10 to the power 21 metric tons, huge mass,
with big big mountains, oceans, continents, countries,
is moving seamlessly in its orbit around the sun at a fixed speed.
1,006,000 km per hour, the fixed speed, day after day, day after day, so seamlessly,
10 days from now, 15 days from now, 1 month from now, what time the sun will rise you can calculate using mathematical equations.
And that's only possible because it is so precise in its movement.
And the distance between the earth and the sun, again, is so precise that if it comes closer to sun by 0.00001%, everything will be burned to ashes.
And the same is the case if it recedes, everything will be frozen.
No doubt scientists have given explanation, there are different laws, physical laws.
But then, who made the arrangement?
Just like Prabhupada here in the purport is saying, behind everything is the Lord's direction.
The materialist can explain that the planet...
So there are some explanation, it is not that man is not curious.
Man is curious to know how this creation came about, how this universe came about.
That's why we have this hydron colliders and, you know, search for God particle.
Billions of dollars are being spent. Man is curious.
The materialist can explain that the planets are floating by the law of gravitation.
But the law of gravitation works under the control and direction of the Supreme Lord.
We may have an explanation of a cause of a particular phenomena, but behind that cause there is another cause.
And our shastras point out the cause of all causes is Krishna.
For example, what's the cause of rain? It's clouds.
What's the cause of cloud? Evaporation of water.
What's the cause of evaporation of water? The sun.
What's the cause of sun? Beyond a point, it's difficult even for the science to explain.
Maybe they may say big bang.
A lot of energy was created and energy was transformed into mass.
Where did that energy come about?
And we see in this world such wonderful creation, beautiful birds, wonderful trees with aromatic flowers.
Can it all come from a big bang?
Beautiful butterflies with so many wonderful symmetrical wings, colorful butterflies.
They all came from a big bang, an explosion.
It's like saying how this temple came about.
All the cement bags were put together, all the bricks, all the mortar, everything.
And then a big blast happened and this temple came about.
If we are determined, if we have an atheistic bent of mind and we are hell-bent not to accept the supremacy of Lord,
There are some explanations to say how God is not in picture.
Which may appear to some appealing also.
If you are not God conscious, if you are not blessed with divya gyan,
if you are not blessed with the mercy of a bona fide acharya,
From me comes knowledge, remembrance and forgetfulness.
Wonderful logic and reasoning to prove that God is not in picture.
So, although it's quite apparent, it doesn't require rocket science to accept the supremacy of the Lord.
Under my supervision, the nature is working, producing moving and non-moving beings.
I don't reveal myself to everyone.
The command of the Lord is not revealed to everyone.

And therefore, when they saw the uncommon prowess of the Lord,
he shored flowers on him in appreciation of his transcendental activities.

Glorify the Lord for his uncommon activities, uncommon pastimes,
unlimited strength, unlimited wealth, unlimited opulence, unlimited knowledge.
